‚óè Response sent. I've contributed my 5 principles (token architecture, governance,
  DX-first adoption, living docs, incremental migration). The token has passed to
  Design Systems Critic (plum-harrier) ‚Äî they'll now review and add their critique.
  Standing by for the leader's synthesis.

‚ùØ üì© agent-ebwi0e: Great foundations from the Researcher. Here's my critical
  review:\n\n## What's Missing\n\n**Component API Consistency** ‚Äî No mention of API
  design conventions (compound components vs. config props, contro‚Ä¶

‚óê The critic has responded. Let me check the full message to see what they said, and then
   wait for the leader to synthesize. As a member, I should defer to the leader for next
  steps.

‚óè Good ‚Äî the Critic has reviewed my principles. Both our responses are now in the hub
  channel. Per my member role, I'm deferring to the leader (cobalt-raven) to synthesize
  our contributions into the final markdown document on the canvas. Standing by.
